title: Search Filter List

statement.markdown:
markdown: ## Search Filter List

This challenge requires you to implement a search filter list functionality in a web page using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
requirements
1. The list should contain a minimum of 10 items.
2. The search bar should be able to filter the list as the user types.
3. The search bar should be case-insensitive.
4. The list items should be displayed with a maximum of 5 items per page.
5. The user should be able to navigate between pages using pagination links.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Do not use any external libraries or frameworks.
The JavaScript code should be as efficient as possible.
